properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain Break every chain, break every chain, break every chain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's an army rising up There's an army rising up There's an army rising up To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain Break every chain, break every chain, break every chain

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's an army rising up There's an army rising up There's an army rising up To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling I hear the chains falling

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There is power in the name of Jesus To break every chain, break every chain, break every chain
